afterSnapshot.duplicateJustification: getDirections and getWeather serve different API routes (/api/directions vs /api/weather) and call different business-logic functions (analyzeDirections vs fetchWeather). The Result-checking boilerplate is similar but the endpoints are distinct.

duplicateCandidates.name: getWeather
duplicateCandidates.purpose: Fetch weather data for a lat/lon position, mapping Result to HTTP response.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Handler must now inspect .ok on the analyzeDirections Result and map success/failure to 200/500.
implementation: Check result.ok — return result.data on success, or { error: true, message } with 500 on failure.
